title: MONTHLY VACCINATION AND MICROCHIP CLINICS - 211info
text: FOTAS MONTHLY LOW-COST VACCINATION AND MICROCHIP CLINIC MONTHLY VACCINATION AND MICROCHIP CLINICS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a low-cost vaccination and microchip clinic for community members dogs and cats. The vaccines available are rabies, cat distemper/PanLeuk/upper respiratory, dog distemper/Parvo/upper respiratory, and Bordatella. Microchipping services offered. All services are by appointment only and appointments must be made for each individual animal. 300 W Valley View Road Talent, OR 97540 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 3rd Saturday of the month Email (541) 708-0090 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 708-0090 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: Vaccinations are $25 per animal and microchipping services are $30 per animal. Payment must be in the form of cash or a credit/debit card. Checks are not accepted. DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Jackson County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: From I-5 S, take exit 21. Clinic held in the parking lot. Services: Well Animal Checkups If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
